results.title: Wichita-area girls wrestlers make history with two Fargo national titles
results.description: Maize’s Gray Joyce has her arm raised after winning the 145-pound national championship in the 16U girls freestyle division at the U.S. Marine Corps Junior Nationals in Fargo, N.D.

results.title: Verstappen encouraged by Spa performance despite 'unlucky' VSC costing him a chance at second
results.description: Max Verstappen was upbeat after the Belgian Grand Prix despite a Virtual Safety Car costing him a chance at a better result.
